reasoning: The base rate of an older artist achieving #1 overall streams for the year over mega-stars like Taylor Swift and The Weeknd is extremely low. Search results confirm that as of October 2025, Eminem has around 6 billion streams for the year, ranking him outside the top 5 globally (approx. 7th overall or lower, behind Drake in Rap alone). Taylor Swift and others regularly exceed 20 billion annual streams. It is mathematically virtually impossible for Eminem to close this gap by the end of 2025. My estimate is at the minimum bound of 2%.
